pr.title: New Record: Pure Neural GDN 1.0226 BPB (shalyhinpavel)

output.summary: Gated DeltaNet layers, FastLoader, and a dynamic batch curriculum paired with fused AdamW keep this pure neural build within the 16MB/10min regime while pushing zero-shot BPB.
techniques: Gated DeltaNet stack with final attention to compactly model token dynamics
FastLoader prefetching plus batch-size curriculum to sustain GPU throughput
Fused AdamW with TF32 enabled for stable, high-rate updates
